candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: This is an income statement performance line, not a balance sheet minority/non-controlling interest equity balance.

variables.notes: No balance sheet line for minority interest or non-controlling interests is present. Because BE uses 'Total Equity', MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
